stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 14, what is the purpose of taxiway widening on curved segments?

options.a: To be an area adjacent to the edge of a pavement, so prepared as to provide a transition between the pavement and the adjacent surface.
options.b: To protect an aircraft operating on the taxiway and to reduce the risk of damage to an aircraft accidentally running off the taxiway.
options.c: To provide clearance between the outer main wheels of the aeroplane and the edge of the taxiway.
options.d: To provide a surface able to resist erosion and the ingestion of the surface.
